fields.summary: Consecutive StringBuilder append should be reused

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: Consecutive calls to StringBuffer/StringBuilder .append should be chained, reusing the target object. This can improve the performance by producing a smaller bytecode, reducing overhead and improving inlining.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed
